//: FIX-1: self-contained engine tsconfig. The monorepo root tsconfig extended `astro/tsconfigs/strict` — an Astro dependency the standalone breadth engine must not carry. This mirrors the engine's runtime contract: ESM modules, NodeNext resolution (so `./x.js` specifiers resolve to `.ts` source under ts-node), and transpile-only (TS_NODE_TRANSPILE_ONLY=1 is also set on the invocation — type errors never block the air-gapped run).
